task.title: How to use the CDS Report Cards to find specific information?
How is the overall performance of the CDS team in terms of Review activity? How is the performance of a specific CDS in terms of review activity?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Report Cards tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Select the facility from the Facility filter.
Analyze the Review Rate, Encounters Reviewed, Enc with Clarifications, Avg. Initial Review TAT KPI cards.
step.stepresult: These KPI cards helps you analyze the overall review performance of the CDS team in the selected time period. To analyze the data for a specific CDS, refer the CDS Report Card of that CDS.

task.title: How is the overall performance of the CDS team in terms of Clarification activity? How is the performance of a specific CDS in terms of Clarification activity?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Report Cards tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Enc with Clarification, Clarifications Sent, Enc Clarification Rate, Clarification Rate, Response Rate, and Agreement Rate KPI cards.
step.stepresult: These KPI cards helps you analyze the overall clarification performance of the CDS team in the selected time period. To analyze the data for a specific CDS, refer the CDS Report Card of that CDS.

task.title: Who are my top three CDS performers in terms of Review Rate? Which CDS has the highest Enc Clarification Rate?

step.cmd: Select Staff Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the CDS Report Cards tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Report cards of the CDSs to identify the CDS with highest review rate.
Analyze the Enc Clarification Rate metric in the report card for each CDS to identify the CDS with highest encounter clarification rate.
